news.headline: CME Group's Terry Duffy to step down in 2027, CFO Lynne Fitzpatrick to become CEO
news.summary: Duffy, 67, will transition to executive chairman effective March 1, 2027, the company said Wednesday.

news.headline: CNBC to simulcast 11 WNBA games this season
news.summary: The simulcasts will expose the WNBA to an affluent audience on CNBC and marks a new chapter for the business news network after it spun out from Comcast.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $732.95 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $750.94 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Neutral — watch only — wait for confirmation.
Signals are conflicted — let the first 30 minutes set the tone before committing risk.
Use QQQ $732.95 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: NFLX PUT — enter $2.67–$2.95, target $4.21+, stop $1.69.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a firmer open with QQQ +0.42% and SPY +0.08%. Composite sentiment +6 (Neutral). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, sector rotation, vix. VIX at 14.5 (-1.01%). Environment read: watch only — wait for confirmation. Industrials (+1.16%) is leading while Communication (-1.70%) lags. Premarket strength in AVGO, PLTR; weakness in META, GOOGL. The desk's highest-conviction setup is NFLX (6.8/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
